sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: CFO of $3B automation firm Ryan McLeod to lead CAE's finances
feed.summary: CAE (NYSE: CAE) has announced the appointment of Ryan McLeod as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective February 23, 2026. McLeod, who previously served as CFO of ATS Corporation, a $3 billion automation solutions leader, will lead CAE's global finance organization. He will work with interim CFO Constantino Malatesta to ensure a smooth transition.

feed.title: Archrock Inc (NYSE:AROC) Shows High-Scoring Technical Setup for Next Rise
feed.summary: Archrock Inc (NYSE:AROC) is identified as a stock with a high-scoring technical setup for a potential next rise, according to ChartMill. The article details AROC's strong technical condition, including a Technical Rating of 7 out of 10 and a Setup Rating of 9 out of 10, indicating a stock in an upward trend that is currently pausing before a possible continuation. It outlines a potential trading plan with an entry point and stop-loss, emphasizing risk management for investors.

feed.title: Tonix Pharmaceuticals Announces Program Updates on Phase 2/3-Ready Long-Acting Monoclonal Antibody (mAb) Designed for Seasonal Prevention of Lyme Disease (TNX-4800)
feed.summary: Tonix Pharmaceuticals announced updates on TNX-4800, a long-acting monoclonal antibody designed for the seasonal prevention of Lyme disease. The company plans to meet with the FDA in 2026 to discuss Phase 2/3 development options, including a controlled human infection model study, and expects to have investigational product available by early 2027. TNX-4800 aims to provide immediate, seasonal protection against Lyme disease, offering an alternative to traditional vaccines with potential benefits for millions in endemic regions.

feed.title: 2 Large-Cap Stocks with Promising Prospects and 1 We Avoid
feed.summary: This article identifies two large-cap stocks, Monster Beverage (MNST) and Intuitive Surgical (ISRG), as having promising prospects due to strong financials and growth drivers. Conversely, it advises caution on Teradyne (TER) due to declining revenues, profitability issues, and a high valuation. The piece highlights the challenges large-cap companies face in finding new growth but offers StockStory's analysis to navigate these trade-offs.

feed.title: Amazon, Carvana And Others: Bank Of America Reveals 5 Stocks It Thinks Will Win This Earnings Season
feed.summary: Bank of America has identified five stocks—Amazon, Brookdale Senior Living, Corning, Vertiv, and Carvana—that they believe are well-positioned for the upcoming earnings season. The bank cites catalysts such as AI advancements, an aging population, innovation, and industry recoveries as reasons for their optimistic outlook. These recommendations come amid a broader expectation of strong Q4 earnings in the tech sector, driven by demand for AI enterprise services.

feed.title: Welltower care home deals face UK antitrust review
feed.summary: The UK antitrust regulator, the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA), will review Welltower's acquisitions of over 600 care homes managed by Barchester, HC-One, Aria Care, and Danforth Care. The CMA is currently seeking views from interested parties until February 2nd before initiating a formal phase I review.
